caribbean.headline: Western Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing 24 kt winds with 6.3 ft wave heights and a 38% rain probability, while nearby Cozumel has relatively lighter conditions with 14 kt winds. I expect these winds to impact marine activities in the Western Caribbean, particularly around Roatan, where the higher wind speeds and wave heights may prompt a Small Craft Advisory.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Reach 22 kt
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing 22 kt winds with 5.1 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Venice has relatively calmer conditions with 13 kt winds. I expect these winds to continue affecting maritime activities in the Western Mediterranean, particularly around Cadiz, with wave heights and wind speeds remaining steady throughout the day.
